compiledTemplates.template-0: {code: function (c,p,i) { var t=this;t.b(i=i||"");t.b("mkdir -p /etc/xbps.d");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("cp /usr/share/xbps.d/*-repository-*.conf /etc/xbps.d/");t.b("\n" + i);t.b("sed -i 's|https://repo-default.voidlinux.org|");t.b(t.v(t.f("endpoint",c,p,0)));t.b("|g' /etc/xbps.d/*-repository-*.conf");return t.fl(); },partials: {}, subs: {  }}
